title: Minister Pu Lalthansanga'n Champhai Nghakuai Chiah Runpui 2026 a khar
content:
5031/2025-2026

Dated Champhai, 28th March 2026:Fisheries Minister Pu Lalthansanga'n vawiin khan Keilungliah, Champhaia District Fisheries Development Office leh Keilungliah Reservoir Management Committee tangkawp buatsaih Nghakuai Chiah Runpui 2026 (Fish Festival) chu a khar a, he hunah hian khuallian niin sangha man tha te hnenah lawmman a sem bawk a ni.

Khuallian Pu Lalthansanga chuan Keiluangliaha hetiang hun tha tak sangha mantute tana buatsaih hi ropui a tih thu a sawi a, nakin zelah chuan nghakuai chiah bakah thil dang tam tak tih theihna atan Keilungliah hi buatsaiha thuamthuat zel tum a nih thu a sawi. Chutiang hmasawnna atan chuan mipui nena thawhho hi a pawimawh em em a, Champhai mipuite theih ang anga sawrkar hnathawh te tanpui turin a sawm a. Mizoramah sangha khawi nana hectare 4500 hman theihah 1000 chiah la hman tangkai a ni a, sangha khawitu pawh an la tam tawk lo a, Mizoram hian hmun dang atanga sangha lak ngai lo turin kan intung ding thei a ni tih a sawi a, tan la turin mipui a sawm a ni. Bana Kaih hnuaia tanpuina te, PMMSY hnuaia hamthatna te pawh a awm reng a, hmang tangkaia sangha dil tha tak siama tha taka eizawnna insiam thei turte tan chuan heng hamthatna hi lak ngei a that thu a sawi. Hetiang hun hi buatsaih zel theih ni se a tih a thu a sawi a, sangha mantu zawng zawng te'n an hlut ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

He hun hi Fisheries Secretary Er. Lalrothanga'n a kaihruai a, District Fisheries Development Officer Pi Lalremsangpuii'n lawmthu sawiin kharna hun a titawp a ni. He huna lawmman dawngtute chu heng te hi an ni:

Biggest catch (sangha man lian ber)

1st - R. Lalhmingliana, Champhai Vengthar - 1.465 kg

2nd - Ramdawngliana Khiangte, Serchhip - 1.215 kg

3rd - H. Lalruatfela, Tuithiang - 1.075 kg

Most catches (sangha man hnem ber) - H. Lalruatfela, Tuithiang (6)

Youngest catch (sangha man naupang ber) - Lianthangpuia, Champhai Bethel - kum 11

Oldest catch (sangha man upa ber) and best woman angler (hmeichhia man tha ber) - Malsawmkimi, Zotlang, Aizawl - kum 44, 636 grams.

Attachment

title: Aizawl khawpui Faina Hnatlangpui 2026 neih a ni
content:
5030/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl the 28thMarch, 2026:UD&PA, Aizawl Smart City, AMC leh Central YMA tangkawp, Aizawl Khawpui Faina atana Coordination Committee buatsaih Faina Hnatlangpui 2026 chu March ni 28,2026-ah Lammual leh a chhehvel bakah Aizawl khawpui chhung YMA branch tam zawkah neih a ni.

Faina Hnatlangpui tanna hi zing dar 7:30 ah Vanapa hall kawtah neih niin, Pu Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner, AMC in kaihruaiin, Central YMA atangin Prof. Malsawmliana, General Secretary, CYMA in thu a sawi a, UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau chuan Faina Hnatlangpui tanna leh Aizawl City YMA Branch Fai Intihsiakna 2026 khuhhawnna a nei nghal a ni. Kick-off neih zawh hian tlawmngai pawl thenkhat leh Department ruat bik ten zingkar hnatlang hi Lammual leh a chhevel-ah an nei nghal a, Aizawl khawpui chhunga YMA branch tam zawkin remchan dan angin mahni veng theuhah Faina Hnatlangpui hi an zawm ve nghal a, chhiat tawhna avang leh rokhawlhna dang avanga YMA Branch hnatlang thei lo an awm bawk a, YMA Branch thenkhat nimin lama hnatlang an awm bawk a ni.

Faina Hnatlangpui pual hian bawlhhlawh tamna leh hmun bal zual lai 15 (sawmpanga) thlanchhuah niin, a hnaivaia awm YMA branch ten heng hmun tihfai hna hi an thawk nghal a, khua in a zir loh avangin Faina Hnatlangpui hi hmun tam takah a khaihlak a ni.

He Hnatlangpui hi Comprehensive Plan for Municipal Solid Waste Management in Aizawl tihhlawhtlinna tur pakhat anih bakah Aizawl khawpui hi India rama khawpui fai ber leh bawlhhlawh awmlohna Garbage Free Aizawl kan nih theihna tura hmalakna zinga mi a ni. Coordination Committee chuan Faina Hnatlangpuia tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang thawkchhuakte chungah lawmthu sawiin, Faina kawnga hmalakna hrang hrangah theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a ngen a, YMA Branch tin te Aizawl City YMA Branch Fai Intihsiakna 2026-a Fai lawmman la thei theuh tura tan la thar theuh turin a ngen a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah I&WRD Secretary-in Modernisation of Command Area Project hnuaia Water User Society member te kawm
content:
5029/2025-2026

Dated Champhai, 28th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Irrigation & Water Resources Department Secretary, Er. Lalrothanga chuan Champhai tlawhin IWRD hnuaia Pilot Project kalpui mek Modernisation of Command Area Development (MCAD) hnuaia Water User Society member te nen inkawm khawmna hun hlawkthlak tak neih a ni. He project in a tum angin loneitute’n tui hnianghnar zawka an neih theihna tura ruahmanna te sawikhawm niin, pump house leh solar plant dahna hmun tur te tlawhin en fel nghal bawk a ni. He MCAD project in a tum bulpui ber chu canal hmanga thlai tui kan pek hi a aia tui kan hman tangkai theih zawk na turin tihdan tha, hmanraw tha leh changkang (Pressurized Pipe Irrigation Network) hmanga thlak tum ani a, hei hian tui renchem zawk leh tangkai zawkin min hmantir thei anga, thlai thar chhuah a pun phah tur thu te a sawi bawk a ni.

IWRD Secretary chuan he MCAD project hlawhtlinna tura a bulpui ber chu loneitute (Water User Society member) an nih thu sawiin, project zawh a nih hunah pawh an ta anga enkawl chhunzawm zel turin a chah a, he project huam chhung tui hna kan neih ang ang te ti chhe lo leh ti buai lova hman tangkai dan leh rei tak hman dan in zirtir a theh darh pawimawh zia thu te a sawi a ni.

Tuna MCAD Pilot project hi a hlawhtling anih chuan, a ram pum huapa la kalpui chhoh zel tur anih thu sawiin, hei hian Mizoram, fur laia tui hnianghnar tak, thala tui khamkhawp hmu leh silo tan a tangkai tur thu te a sawi a bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL KHAWPUI FAINA HNATLANGPUI LEH CITY BRANCH YMA FAI INTIHSIAK KHUHHAWNNA NEIH A NI
content:
5028/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 28th March, 2026 :Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Department, Aizawl Smart City Limited (ASCL), Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC) leh Central Young Mizo Association (CYMA) tangkawp, Aizawl Khawpui Faina atana Coordination Committee buatsaih, ‘Aizawl Khawpui Faina Hnatlangpui leh City Branch YMA Fai Intihsiak’ chu tukin zing dar 7:30 khan Vanapa Hall kawtah a khuhhawnna (Kick-Off Programme) neih a ni a. He hunah hian Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau, Commissioner & Secretary, UD&PA chu khuallian a ni.

Khuallian Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau chuan thu sawiin, ram leh hnam hmangaihna kawngah Faina ngaih pawimawh a tulzia a sawi a. Mizo mipuite chuan mahni ram tia chhal tur kan nei chu thil hlu tak a ni tih hriain, a enkawl leh tihfai kawngah pawh mawhphurhna kan la tur a ni, a ti a. Fai chu thil hlawk tak a nih thu sawiin, ram pawn atanga Mizoram lo tlawhtute hiptu pawimawh tak leh ram economic value tisangtu pakhat chu Faina a ni, tih a sawi a. Faina ngai pawimawh zual zel turin kalkhawmte chu fuihin, ‘Aizawl Khawpui Faina Hnatlangpui’ leh 'City Branch YMA Fai Intihsiak' chu a hawng nghal a ni.

Pu Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner, AMC chuan hun kaihruaiin, Prof. Malsawmliana, General Secretary, Central YMA chuan Faina kawnga hmalakna chu mimal intin thleng phak a nih theih nan inzirtirna uar deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian UD&PA, Aizawl Smart City Limited leh AMC-a thawktute bakah tlawmngai pawl hrang hrangte an tel a. Vanapa Hall kawta ‘Faina Hnatlangpui 2026’ khuhhawnna neih a nih zawh hnu hian Aizawl khawpui hmun hrang hrangah Faina Hnatlang neih zui nghal a ni.

Attachment
